chat.key: We've been made aware of a bug by which Treant Protector is able to retain the invisibility granted by activating Nature's Guise, despite no longer being close to a tree, for longer than the intended duration. This can be achieved by teleporting to an area without trees, and queuing Nature's Guise to activate upon completion of the teleport. Exploitation of this interaction will be considered bug abuse until further notice for all upcoming CQs and main events, and will therefore be punishable with measures up to and including financial penalties, default losses, or disqualification.
